title: dryopteris rampans
intro: Dryopteris rampans, also known as the wood fern, is a type of perennial fern native to Asia and Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris rampans include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
